message:
feat(conformance): live log goldens + per-fixture runtime config

Two entangled improvements to the conformance harness so the log-
contract + live-diff runners produce reproducible artifacts across
fixtures that need real config/AOF/ACL file paths.

crates/fr-conformance/src/lib.rs
  * Extracts per-fixture runtime tweaking into a
    `configure_runtime_for_fixture(runtime, fixture_name)` helper.
    Centralizes the three kinds of side-setup the harness needs:
      - core_wait.json / fr_p2c_006_replication_journey.json:
        redirect AOF writes to /dev/null so the fixture's
        replication-lag behavior is deterministic.
      - core_acl.json: point acl_file_path at a temp ACL dummy.
      - core_config.json / core_server.json: point
        config_file_path at a uniquely-named temp file via the
        new `runtime_fixture_config_path` helper (stems fixture
        name + pid + monotonic nanos).
  * `runtime_fixture_config_path` uses SystemTime UNIX_EPOCH nanos
    so parallel harness runs don't collide on the same temp file.
  * `run_fixture` replaces its inline if-cascade with a call to
    the new helper. Later fixtures that need custom file paths
    extend the helper, not the caller.

crates/fr-conformance/src/log_contract.rs
  * New `LiveLogGoldenFixture { suite_id, fixture_name, packet_id,
    command_kind }` struct + `LIVE_LOG_GOLDEN_FIXTURES` array
    describing which live-diff suites produce log-contract golden
    evidence:
      - live_redis_diff::core_errors → core_errors.json,
        packet FR-P2C-003, command_kind="command"
      - live_redis_protocol_diff::protocol_negative →
        protocol_negative.json, packet FR-P2C-002,
        command_kind="protocol"
  * New `live_oracle_replay_cmd(command_kind, fixture_name)` that
    emits the exact CLI invocation to reproduce the oracle replay
    (so golden regenerate/verify steps print copy-pasteable cmds).
  * New `live_log_golden_event_pair(...)` + helpers to materialize
    the expected `[unit, e2e]` StructuredLogEvent pair from a
    live suite run, mirroring how `golden_packet_logs` already
    does it for packet-family fixtures.

crates/fr-conformance/src/bin/emit_log_contract_goldens.rs
  * Regenerator CLI: iterates LIVE_LOG_GOLDEN_FIXTURES and writes
    each `[unit, e2e]` pair to its fixture file under
    tests/log_contract_goldens/, with stable formatting + explicit
    `--check` flag to fail instead of overwriting.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/log_contract_goldens.rs
  * New tests iterate `LIVE_LOG_GOLDEN_FIXTURES` and assert each
    live-diff suite regenerates byte-identical goldens (via
    `serde_json::to_string_pretty`) to what's on disk. A drift
    anywhere in the live pipeline now fails in CI.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/log_contract_live.rs
  * Adds coverage for the two live suites: runs
    `run_live_redis_diff` / `run_live_redis_protocol_diff` against
    a vendored oracle and asserts the emitted log-contract events
    match `live_log_golden_event_pair` element-wise (suite id,
    packet id, command kind, command sha, oracle outcome).

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * Imports expanded to surface `CaseOutcome`,
    `run_live_redis_diff_for_cases`, `fr_protocol::{RespFrame,
    parse_frame}`, `fr_runtime::Runtime`, and `std::fs` so the new
    live tests can construct per-case scenarios.
  * Adds the VendoredRedisOracle harness hooks the live suites use,
    and smoke-tests a subset of CaseOutcomes on a real oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
